description_long: This is a small, rustic kiosk with a thatched, sloped roof supported by two vertical poles at the front and a central frame at the back. The kiosk features a bamboo or wooden counter with two matching stools in front, and two coconuts with straws placed on the countertop, suggesting a tropical or beachside refreshment stand. The front of the kiosk is open for customer interaction, while the rear has shelving for storage or display. The structure is primarily constructed from bamboo or wood, with a natural, earthy color palette and a weathered appearance. The roof overhangs the counter, providing shade and shelter, and the stools have round, wooden seats with simple, sturdy legs. There are no visible windows, doors, or signage, emphasizing its simple, open-air design.
description: A rustic, bamboo kiosk with a thatched roof, open front counter, and two stools, featuring coconuts on the countertop. The design is simple and tropical, with natural wood and earthy tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open counter, two stools, and coconuts on the countertop under the thatched roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk, the overhanging roof, and the arrangement of the stools beside the counter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the shelving behind the counter and the back structure of the kiosk, with the thatched roof overhead.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the stools, the counter, and the supporting frame of the roof.
attribute_roof_design: Sloped, thatched roof with overhangs on all sides, constructed from natural plant material.
